settings.heading: Property field support with clear scope boundaries
settings.text: Use property field support when a property-related business task needs practical coordination, field information or support routing before the next operational step.

settings.heading: What to confirm before requesting support
settings.text: Availability and scope depend on location, access, site requirements, timing and the exact field task requested.

settings.title: Availability and location
settings.text: Confirm the property address, access windows, site contact, travel requirements and whether the task can be supported in the requested location.

settings.title: Information to provide
settings.text: Include the property address, task purpose, site access details, required photos or notes, timing constraints and any safety or access restrictions.

settings.title: Practical field scope
settings.text: Support may include practical field coordination, information gathering, status updates or routing where the scope is agreed first.

settings.title: Advice boundary
settings.text: RBP does not provide property, legal, valuation, building, planning, compliance, insurance or regulated professional advice through property field services.

settings.title: What is not included
settings.text: Unscoped inspections, certification, emergency attendance, valuation, compliance assessment, trade work and specialist reports are not included unless separately arranged.

settings.title: Request support
settings.text: Contact RBP with the address, requested task, timing, access instructions and required output.

settings.heading: Request property field support
settings.text: Send the property address, requested support, location constraints, site contact and required output so RBP can assess whether the request is in scope.
settings.aside_text: Include address, site access, timing, contact person, photos or notes needed, safety restrictions and whether any specialist professional advice is required outside RBP's scope.
